final:
module eeprom_controller (
    input [4:0] data_in,
    input write_enable,
    output reg [4:0] data_out
);
    reg [4:0] memory_cell;

    always @(*) begin
  if (write_enable) begin memory_cell = data_in ; // Write data to memory cell
  end
  end

  always @(*) begin
  data_out = memory_cell ;
  end
endmodule
